command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== FULL GIT STATE vm-claude-hub ==='
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo "HEAD: $(git rev-parse HEAD)"
echo "branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
git log --oneline -5
git status --short

echo '=== FULL GIT STATE vm-memory ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo "HEAD: $(git rev-parse HEAD)"
echo "branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
git log --oneline -5
git status --short | head -5
echo "remote: $(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null)"
' 2>&1

echo '=== DELEGATOR BINARY DETAILS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
echo "binary: $(ls -la /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate)"
echo "sha256: $(sha256sum /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate | cut -d" " -f1)"
echo "source: /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub/core.py"
echo "core_sha256: $(sha256sum /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub/core.py | cut -d" " -f1)"
echo "backup: $(ls /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub/core.py.pre-aider-config-fix 2>/dev/null)"
echo "config: $(cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("v"+d.get("version","?")+" 3090timeout="+str(d["workers"]["primary"]["timeout_seconds"])+" 3060timeout="+str(d["workers"]["auxiliary"]["timeout_seconds"]))")"
echo "config_sha256: $(sha256sum /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json | cut -d" " -f1)"
' 2>&1

echo '=== ALL JOB STATES ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
for job in /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/*/job.json; do
    python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open("$job"))
print(d["job_id"],d["status"],d["stage"],"3060="+str(d["worker_usage"]["windows-ollama-3060"]),"3090="+str(d["worker_usage"]["windows-ollama-3090"]))
" 2>/dev/null
done
' 2>&1

echo '=== TASK INTAKE ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls -la /home/jose/moreno-tasks/intake/ 2>/dev/null" 2>&1

echo '=== POLLER LAST ID ==='
cat ~/.poller_last_id 2>/dev/null

echo DONE_1978
